rag_rules: Fix unresolved identifiers or invalid helpers on the same line as type errors; remove invalid clauses if unresolved.
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantee expressions.
generic_rules: In AGREE contracts, ensure all named things are valid expressions with known types.
Avoid using implementation-only paths in component type annexes for output dependency guarantees.
When a guarantee expression has type '<error>', trace and resolve the first unresolved identifier on the same line.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Guarantee expressions must evaluate to a boolean type.
Visible identifiers in an annex are limited to those declared in the same annex or accessible AADL features.
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture elements to fix type errors; instead, resolve the root cause of the invalid reference.
Do not reference subcomponent paths in component type annexes for guarantees.
irrelevant_topics: Assume/guarantee syntax in component type annexes
